name: CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLoad

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().parameters.TempOwner}.BLUEKC_HCG_TEMP; WITH cte AS (SELECT CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLM_LN_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, MR_CASE_ADM_CT, MR_PROC_CT, MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, CASE_ADM_ID, MR_LN_ID, UPPER(MR_LN_CASE_ID) AS MR_LN_CASE_ID, MR_LN_DTL_ID, FCLTY_CASE_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.VersionId}' AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.X971_TMP_CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP AS T USING cte AS S ON T.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK = S.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CLM_ID = S.CLM_ID, T.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO = S.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, T.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK = S.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.CLM_LN_SK = S.CLM_LN_SK, T.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK = S.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, T.MR_CASE_ADM_CT = S.MR_CASE_ADM_CT, T.MR_PROC_CT = S.MR_PROC_CT, T.MR_UNIT_DAY_CT = S.MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, T.CASE_ADM_ID = S.CASE_ADM_ID, T.MR_LN_ID = S.MR_LN_ID, T.MR_LN_CASE_ID = S.MR_LN_CASE_ID, T.MR_LN_DTL_ID = S.MR_LN_DTL_ID, T.FCLTY_CASE_ID = S.FCLTY_CASE_ID, T.VRSN_ID = S.VRSN_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, CLM_ID, CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CLM_LN_SK, MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, MR_CASE_ADM_CT, MR_PROC_CT, MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, CASE_ADM_ID, MR_LN_ID, MR_LN_CASE_ID, MR_LN_DTL_ID, FCLTY_CASE_ID, VRSN_ID) VALUES (S.CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP_SK, S.CLM_ID, S.CLM_LN_SEQ_NO, S.CLM_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.CLM_LN_SK, S.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_SK, S.MR_CASE_ADM_CT, S.MR_PROC_CT, S.MR_UNIT_DAY_CT, S.CASE_ADM_ID, S.MR_LN_ID, S.MR_LN_CASE_ID, S.MR_LN_DTL_ID, S.FCLTY_CASE_ID, S.VRSN_ID);

Annotations:
Read Load File created in the FKEY job
Copy Stage for buffer
Load CLM_LN_HLTH_CST_GRP table.
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file
The temp table #TempOwner#.BLUEKC_HCG_TEMP will be created in the job CblTalnIdsClmLnHlthCstGrpExtr.
and the global temp table #TempOwner#.BLUEKC_HCG_TEMP will be dropped in the AFTER SQL step
